---
title: ""
---

<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:25vh;">

# Syrphidae of Luxembourg {.unnumbered}

<img src="images/coverpage.jpg" style="width:40%; border-radius:10px; margin:20px 0;">

Julian Wittische  
Alain Frantz  
Alexander Weigand  

<br>

National Museum of Natural History, Luxembourg · 2026

</div>
